ignoreValues.reason: Rail width tween must reflow the main content column as the rail narrows; a transform/opacity substitute would slide the painted rail but leave its layout box full-width, so the content column keeps a gap. One short transition on a single element, user-toggle only, off the hot path. User-confirmed false positive.
L16 is the quilt-glyph: scheme string constant; L334 is the legitimate custom-icon branch rendering a real user-supplied URL. Neither is a placeholder. User-confirmed false positives.
